contents: {a=Person_Craig}Craig{a} finally joins The Helldivers to help liberate the galaxy. But, after some training and a few missions, he resigned and began to heavily slander the cause by stating "[The Helldivers] are silly!"

{a=Person_Craig}Craig{a} and {a=Person_Tokxi}Tokxi{a} finally decided to get married. This made {a=Person_Sonic}Sonic the Hedgehog{a} (his old friend) so furious, they crashed the wedding and began an emotional rant:
"We were going to travel the world together, go to Scotland, eat a lot of food like chili-dogs, and go see Sonic 3 staring Keanu Reeves!"
"Craig, I've known you for 88 billion years. We met in kindergarten. We sat next to each other, in class. You even introduced me to [Tokxi] and I thought he was cool. But not anymore."
"How fucking dare you! After everything we've been through. I was the one that bailed you out of jail. I gave you my left kidney. Screw you, you bitch! I can't take this shit no more, man!"
He was later chased out by a clown with an Uzi.
